LanguageData.VBE_Printing.description: Build a typwriter, which allows your colonists to write books significantly faster, as well as create newspapers for temporary joy boost.
LanguageData.VBE_Printing.label: printing
LanguageData.VBE_Writing.description: Construct a writing desk and have your colonists write books that pass their knowledge to other members of their society.
LanguageData.VBE_Writing.label: writing
